title: dianthus caryophyllus f. longifolius
intro: Dianthus caryophyllus f. longifolius, also known as the carnation, is a fragrant, flowering plant species within the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). The carnation plant has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and antispasmodic properties, which make it useful for wound healing and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Dianthus caryophyllus f. longifolius include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and provide relief from anxiety and insomnia, making it a popular herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
